problem.summary: Define the low-precision block-scaled FP4/NVFP4 GEMM task boundary, including packing, scale metadata, accumulator, and architecture feature checks.
outputs: GEMM output with requested accumulator/output policy
constraints: Template-only; verify exact ROCm format, Composable Kernel, and Transformer Engine on ROCm support before compiling
Record scale block shape and packing order
Do not claim CDNA4/RDNA4-specific behavior on non-CDNA4/RDNA4 hardware

verification.method: Implement CPU and strongest-library references, then compare outputs before timing claims.

curation.notes: Promoted from the v2 extension backlog as a template-only task. No performance, correctness, or profiler evidence is claimed yet.
